plugin.name: wayfire-flip-lock
plugin._long: Freeze the screen and rotate it edge-on about the Y (vertical) or X (horizontal) axis over black, then hold, as if the desktop turned away on a hinge. A pre-lock transition driven over IPC by lumen-lockscreen; the held edge-on frame is what the lock surface rotates back out of (the lock is on the "back side" of the flip).

option.name: toggle
option._long: Optional keybinding to play the flip by hand. Unset by default — the real driver is the lumen-lockscreen daemon over IPC.

option.name: axis
option._long: Which axis the screen rotates about: "y" turns it about the vertical axis (foreshortening its width), "x" about the horizontal axis (foreshortening its height). The lockscreen overrides this per-run over IPC to match its own setting.

option.name: backdrop_color
option._long: Flat colour shown in the widening margins as the screen rotates edge-on. Black by default so the desktop appears to turn away into a void.

option.name: safety_timeout
option._long: If the driving daemon dies and never sends stop, restore the desktop after this long rather than freezing forever.
